title: Court allows immigration enforcement activity near Minnesota schools to continue
summary_en: A federal court denied a request for a preliminary injunction in Fridley Public School District (ISD 14) et al. v. Mullin et al., allowing immigration enforcement activity at and around public…
title_cn: 法院准许明尼苏达州学校周边继续开展移民执法活动
summary_cn: 近期，相关法院就明尼苏达州学校周边移民执法活动限制诉求作出裁决，明确准许移民执法部门在该州各级各类学校周边区域继续依法开展移民执法活动。

title: Education Minnesota endorses Morrison for Congress
summary_en: Education Minnesota has endorsed the reelection campaign of U.S. Rep. Kelly Morrison in Minnesota’s 3rd Congressional District.
title_cn: 明尼苏达州教育协会正式支持莫里森参选国会议员
